ddls:
CREATE TABLE "skills" (
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the skill */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Minimum level required to use the skill */,
  "cooldown" TEXT /* Cooldown time for the skill */,
  "mana_cost" INTEGER /* Mana cost for using the skill */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the skill's effect */,
  "showcase_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the showcase for the skill */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skill category */,
  "prerequisite_skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prerequisite skill */,
  "is_hidden" INTEGER /* Indicates if the skill is hidden */,
  "skill_type" TEXT /* Type of the skill (e.g., active, passive) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the skill effect */,
  "range" TEXT /* Range of the skill */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the skill icon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skills_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES skill_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skills_prerequisite_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("prerequisite_skill_id") REFERENCES skills ("skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skills_showcase_id FOREIGN KEY ("showcase_id") REFERENCES showcases ("showcase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "showcases" (
  "showcase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each showcase */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image representing the skill */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of a video demonstrating the skill */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the showcase */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL of the thumbnail image */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the showcase was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the showcase was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("showcase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Current level of the player */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player's character class */,
  "gold" INTEGER /* Amount of gold the player has */,
  "xp" INTEGER /* Experience points of the player */,
  "health" INTEGER /* Current health points of the player */,
  "max_health" INTEGER /* Maximum health points the player can have */,
  "last_known_location" TEXT /* Last known location of the player in the game world */,
  "is_online" INTEGER /* Indicates if the player is currently online */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES character_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_skills" (
  "player_skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player skill entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who acquired the skill */,
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skill acquired by the player */,
  "acquired_level" INTEGER /* Level at which the skill was acquired */,
  "proficiency_level" INTEGER /* Proficiency level of the player in the skill */,
  "last_used" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the skill was used by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_skills_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("skill_id") REFERENCES skills ("skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_skills_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skill_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the category icon */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is default */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skill_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "parent_skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent skill that must be learned first */,
  "child_skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the child skill that requires the parent skill */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., prerequisite, enhancement) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skill_relationships_child_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_skill_id") REFERENCES skills ("skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skill_relationships_parent_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_skill_id") REFERENCES skills ("skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mana_system" (
  "mana_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the mana record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player associated with this mana record */,
  "current_mana" INTEGER /* Current mana points of the player */,
  "max_mana" INTEGER /* Maximum mana points the player can have */,
  "regeneration_rate" INTEGER /* Mana regeneration rate per second */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mana_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mana_system_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cooldowns" (
  "cooldown_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cooldown entry */,
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skill associated with this cooldown */,
  "cooldown_time" TEXT /* Cooldown time for the skill */,
  "last_used" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the skill was used */,
  "remaining_time" INTEGER /* Remaining cooldown time in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cooldown_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cooldowns_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("skill_id") REFERENCES skills ("skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skill_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the skill statistic record */,
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skill associated with these statistics */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the skill has been used */,
  "last_used" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the skill was used */,
  "average_effectiveness" REAL /* Average effectiveness of the skill */,
  "usage_frequency" REAL /* Usage frequency of the skill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skill_stats_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("skill_id") REFERENCES skills ("skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skill_effects" (
  "effect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each effect */,
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skill associated with this effect */,
  "effect_type" TEXT /* Type of effect (e.g., damage, heal, buff) */,
  "effect_value" INTEGER /* Value of the effect (e.g., amount of damage) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the effect in seconds */,
  "effect_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the effect */,
  "effect_icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the effect icon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("effect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skill_effects_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("skill_id") REFERENCES skills ("skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skill_targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target entry */,
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skill associated with this target */,
  "target_type" TEXT /* Type of target (e.g., single, area, self) */,
  "area_effect" INTEGER /* Whether the skill has an area effect */,
  "target_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the target type */,
  "target_icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the target icon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skill_targets_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("skill_id") REFERENCES skills ("skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quests" (
  "quest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quest */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the quest */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the quest */,
  "required_skill_id" INTEGER /* The skill required to complete the quest */,
  "reward_gold" INTEGER /* Gold reward for completing the quest */,
  "reward_xp" INTEGER /* Experience points reward for completing the quest */,
  "reward_items" TEXT /* Items rewarded for completing the quest */,
  "quest_level" INTEGER /* Level of the quest */,
  "is_repeated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the quest can be repeated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quests_required_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("required_skill_id") REFERENCES skills ("skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory item */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who owns the item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item the player possesses */,
  "equipped" INTEGER /* Indicates if the item is equipped */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of the item (e.g., consumable, equipment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skill_items" (
  "skill_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill-item association */,
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skill associated with this item */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item associated with this skill */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the item has been used with the skill */,
  "last_used" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the item was used with the skill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skill_items_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES inventory ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skill_items_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("skill_id") REFERENCES skills ("skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the character class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the character class */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the class icon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_quests" (
  "player_quest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-quest entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who took the quest */,
  "quest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quest */,
  "progress" INTEGER /* Progress of the quest */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the quest (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the quest was started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the quest was completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_quest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_quests_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_quests_quest_id FOREIGN KEY ("quest_id") REFERENCES quests ("quest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_achievements" (
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each achievement */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who earned the achievement */,
  "achievement_name" TEXT /* Name of the achievement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the achievement */,
  "earned_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the achievement was earned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("achievement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_achievements_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skill_modifiers" (
  "modifier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each modifier */,
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skill associated with this modifier */,
  "modifier_type" TEXT /* Type of modifier (e.g., damage increase, cooldown reduction) */,
  "modifier_value" REAL /* Value of the modifier */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the modifier in seconds */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the modifier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("modifier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skill_modifiers_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("skill_id") REFERENCES skills ("skill_id")
)
